title: Comparisons Mastery Test
description: 1500 original multiple-choice comparison questions for General English, VSTEP, IELTS, TOEIC, and Cambridge-style practice.
sourceNotes: Original questions generated from comparative, superlative, quantifier, and chart-comparison patterns; not copied from source materials.

questions.prompt: Choose the correct comparison. Focus: -er + than. Context set 0001.
options: This lesson is shorter than the previous one.
This lesson is shortest than the previous one.
This lesson is more shorter than the previous one.
This lesson is short than the previous one.
questions.answer: This lesson is shorter than the previous one.
questions.explanation: Short adjectives usually form the comparative with -er plus than.

questions.prompt: Choose the best comparative or superlative form. Focus: the + -est. Context set 0002.
options: The practice test is longest in the course.
The practice test is the most longest in the course.
The practice test is the longer in the course.
The practice test is the longest in the course.
questions.answer: The practice test is the longest in the course.
questions.explanation: Use the plus the -est form for short adjective superlatives.
